2605.23898.title: SPACENUM: Revisiting Spatial Numerical Understanding in VLMs
2605.23898.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed in embodied environments, where they need produce numerical outputs such as action magnitudes and spatial coordinates. Although these numbers appear meaningful, it remains unclear whether these numerical outputs are genuinely grounded in spatial perception. Therefore, in this work, we revisit spatial numerical understanding through SpaceNum, a unified framework that captures two complementary settings: numbers as dynamic transitions during spatial exploration, and numbers as static layouts in spatial reasoning. We formulate two bidirectional tasks, Num2Space and Space2Num, to evaluate how well VLMs map between vision-side spatial structure and language-side numerical representations. We systematically study whether current VLMs truly understand numerical values in spatial settings. Across dynamic transitions and static layouts, we find that models largely fail to ground numbers in spatial meaning and often perform close to random guess. Through error analysis, reasoning trace analysis, and controlled interventions, we show that current VLMs rely heavily on shallow spatial cues, struggle to build stable coordinate-aware representations, and fail to abstract structured spatial layouts from visual observations. We further show that explicit reasoning provides only marginal gains, while tuning can partially improve spatial numerical understanding and transfer to external spatial reasoning benchmarks.
2605.23898.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）越來越多地應用於具身環境中，在這些環境中，它們需要產生數值輸出，例如動作大小和空間坐標。雖然這些數字看起來有意義，但目前尚不清楚這些數值輸出是否真正根植於空間感知。因此，在本研究中，我們通過 SpaceNum 重新審視空間數值理解，這是一個統一框架，捕捉兩種互補的設定：數字作為空間探索過程中的動態轉變，以及數字作為空間推理中的靜態佈局。我們制定了兩個雙向任務，Num2Space 和 Space2Num，以評估 VLMs 在視覺側空間結構和語言側數值表示之間的映射效果。我們系統地研究當前 VLMs 是否真正理解空間環境中的數值。通過動態轉變和靜態佈局，我們發現模型在將數字與空間意義對接方面大多失敗，並且表現往往接近隨機猜測。通過錯誤分析、推理痕跡分析和控制干預，我們顯示當前 VLMs 嚴重依賴淺層空間線索，難以建立穩定的坐標感知表示，並且無法從視覺觀察中抽象出結構化的空間佈局。我們進一步顯示，明確的推理僅提供邊際增益，而調整可以部分改善空間數值理解並轉移到外部空間推理基準。
2605.23898.author: Jianshu Zhang et.al.
2605.23898.authors: Jianshu Zhang, Yijiang Li, Huifeixin Chen, Haoran Lu, Letian Xue, Bingyang Wang, Han Liu
